headline: Holistiplan named #1 tax planning software for the fifth consecutive year as adoption reaches 8,000+ advisory firms
the_so_what: When 51% of advisors now use tax planning software versus 7% in 2019, Holistiplan's five-year dominance shows AI-powered tax analysis has moved from differentiator to table stakes — firms without it are losing proposals.
summary: Holistiplan was ranked #1 tax planning software for the fifth consecutive year in the 2025 T3/Inside Information Technology Survey, with over 8,000 advisory firms now on the platform. The software uses AI and OCR to analyse client tax returns in minutes and identify planning opportunities — Roth conversions, tax-loss harvesting, charitable giving strategies — that previously required a specialist. Market penetration for tax planning software has grown from 7% of advisors in 2019 to 51% in 2025, with Holistiplan holding the dominant share. Holistiplan also qualified for the survey's '9.00+ user rating club', reflecting the highest customer satisfaction across all tools in the category.

key_stat.label: Advisory firms using Holistiplan — #1 tax planning software 5 consecutive years

verified_claims: #1 tax planning software — 2025 T3/Inside Information Technology Survey, 5th consecutive year (Holistiplan official press release March 5, 2025)
